updates.title: How to avoid TDS deduction on EPF withdrawal: Eligibility and rules explained
updates.summary: Withdrawing from your EPF before five years may incur TDS if the amount is over  ₹50,000. Exemptions exist for those with nil tax liability who can submit Form 121. Details here.&nbsp;

updates.summary: FPIs were net sellers of securities worth a record  ₹1.8 trillion in FY26, the highest in 34 years and up from  ₹1.3 trillion in FY25. The highest outflows were seen in March 2026 at around  ₹1.18 trillion.

updates.title: 20/4/10 rule explained: How this budgeting formula can prevent car loan stress
updates.summary: Hooked on a shiny car but worried about loan stress? Start with the 20/4/10 rule to protect your finances: 20% down payment, 4-year loan, and total car costs under 10% of your monthly income. Read on to understand the basic concepts before you lock in with a fresh car loan EMI.&nbsp;
